Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('code:', d.get\('code'\), 'routes:', len\(d.get\('routes',[]\)\), 'dist:', d['routes'][0]['distance'] if d.get\('routes'\) else 'N/A'\)")
